plugins.name: opencode
plugins.description: Deprecated alias for opencode-companion. Slash commands were removed/replaced by the companion skill runtime.

plugins.name: daytona
plugins.description: Deprecated alias for daytona-companion. Slash commands were removed/replaced by the companion skill runtime.

plugins.name: opencode-companion
plugins.description: OpenCode companion skill for direct serve/session/job/review runtime workflows without slash-command wrappers.

plugins.name: daytona-companion
plugins.description: Daytona companion skill for sandbox lifecycle, artifacts, and global project-scoped state without slash-command wrappers.

plugins.name: paseo-companion
plugins.description: Paseo CLI companion skill — neutral reference for run/send/wait/logs/attach/ls plus loops, schedules, terminals, worktrees, chat, permits, daemon management, and host/port targeting for non-local daemons via `paseo run --host <ip>:<port>`.

plugins.name: google-workspace
plugins.description: Interact with Google Workspace services (Docs, Drive, Sheets, etc.) via the gws CLI.

plugins.name: task-iteration
plugins.description: Orchestrate end-to-end feature implementation from an exec-plan document. Delegates coding to OpenCode, runs independent evaluation, loops fixes until clean, and gates completion on an advisory review.
